field_values.action_summary: Under the alias "John Carter," facilitated by Kantos Kan, Carter undergoes training as a Zodangan air scout. He spends several days mastering Martian aviation and the mechanics of the eighth-ray propulsion systems.
field_values.camera_intent: Action montage shots; Close-ups of machinery and controls; POV shots from the air vessels
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Progression of john_carter physical fatigue (sweat, grime, posture)
Shifting weather and sky conditions across training days
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC004

## Production Intent
A multi-day training montage documenting the transition of john_carter from an outsider to a proficient Zodangan air scout. The sequence must visually communicate technical mastery of eighth-ray propulsion and Martian aviation through repetitive, escalating skill demonstrations.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- kantos_kan

## Required Environments
- zodangan_aviation_training_grounds
- Air vessels

## Continuity Constraints
- Progression of john_carter physical fatigue (sweat, grime, posture)
- Shifting weather and sky conditions across training days

## Beat List
- BT001: Mechanical study of eighth-ray systems
- BT002: Repetitive mechanical adjustment montage
- BT003: Physical exhaustion during training
- BT004: Successful flight execution
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
